A0149.title: Firmware OTA Update Signature Verification
A0149.definition: Digital signature verification of firmware packages delivered via OTA to ensure trusted origin and integrity against tampering.
A0149.description: Prevents malicious firmware from being implanted through OTA. Measures: firmware packages signed with the vendor's private key; device-side verification using the embedded public key; secure hashing algorithms; certificate chain validation; anti-rollback version enforcement; automatic rollback upon update failure.
A0149.limitation: Complex key management; increased latency due to signature verification; certificate expiration requires handling.
